{
    "prompt": "string",
    "numResults": 1,
    "maxTokens": 16,
    "minTokens": 0,
    "temperature": 0.7,
    "topP": 1,

        "string"
    ],
    "topKReturn": 0,
    "epoch": 0,
    "frequencyPenalty": {
        "scale": 0,
        "applyToWhitespaces": true,
        "applyToPunctuations": true,
        "applyToNumbers": true,
        "applyToStopwords": true,
        "applyToEmojis": true
    },
    "presencePenalty": {
        "scale": 0,
        "applyToWhitespaces": true,
        "applyToPunctuations": true,
        "applyToNumbers": true,
        "applyToStopwords": true,
        "applyToEmojis": true
    },
    "countPenalty": {
        "scale": 0,
        "applyToWhitespaces": true,
        "applyToPunctuations": true,
        "applyToNumbers": true,
        "applyToStopwords": true,
        "applyToEmojis": true
    }
}
